# flows_data_table_columns (Data Source)

Data source for retrieving all columns of a Data Table.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "flows_data_table" "example" {
  project_id = "your-project-id"
  name       = "my-data-table"
}

data "flows_data_table_columns" "example" {
  data_table_id = flows_data_table.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data_table_id` (String) ID of the data table to fetch columns for.

### Read-Only

- `columns` (Attributes List) List of columns in the data table. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--columns))

<a id="nestedatt--columns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `columns`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) ID of the column.
- `name` (String) Name of the column.
- `ref_table_id` (String) ID of the referenced table (only for row_ref type columns).
- `type` (String) Type of the column (e.g., boolean, datetime, float, integer, json, row_ref, string).
